title: Consult | Your Business
description: A business-site starter consultation page focused on fit, scope, and next steps.
heroTitle: Make the first conversation feel specific and low-friction
heroText: Use this page to explain who the consultation is for, what people should bring, and what happens after the first conversation.

cards.title: Who this is for
cards.text: Describe the kinds of teams, founders, clients, or problems that are most likely to fit.

cards.title: What to bring
cards.text: Set expectations clearly: project context, a decision point, a rough brief, or a specific operational problem.

cards.title: What happens after
cards.text: Explain whether the next step is a proposal, a scope note, a follow-up email, or a simple no-fit decision.

cards.title: What a good fit looks like
cards.text: Use this area to be honest about boundaries so the page feels more professional and more trustworthy.
